evidence.text: 🗓 MATCHDAY UPDATE: Saturday's clash with Red Vale United now kicks off at 6:00 PM ET. Same place, louder crowd. 🔵⚓ #HCFC
Schedule change ✅ Kickoff against Harbour City confirmed for 6pm Eastern this Saturday. Travel safe, Vale family. ❤️🤍

evidence.title: Matchweek 16 Schedule | Continental Soccer League
evidence.snippet: Saturday June 20 — Harbour City FC v Red Vale United, Beacon Yard Stadium, New York. Kickoff 6:00 PM ET.
